title: Beacon of Hope
description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold].
notes: Triggers whenever the owner gains Block. Distributes 50% of the gained Block amount to other alive player creatures on the same side (excluding the owner). Only triggers if the amount to distribute is at least 1 point, and prevents recursive triggering during a single block gain event.
